title: Forum Certification
desc: Get certified in the Elevate Forum method, led by Prospero & Jane Eyre.

title: Welcome Social
desc: The whole group comes together to open the retreat at the main lodge.

title: Forum
desc: The heart of Elevate. In small, confidential groups, members put real challenges and opportunities on the table.

title: Forum, continued
desc: A second working session with your Forum group.

title: Pre-Dinner Drinks
desc: Gather for drinks before the private dinners.

title: Private Dinners
desc: Three concurrent private dinners, each a curated conversation.

title: Workshops
desc: Choose one of three concurrent workshops.

title: Experiences
desc: Get out on the water and around the property — boat rides, padel, and volleyball.

title: Closing Party
desc: A classic dock party with a campfire to close out the retreat.
